result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: No
JUSTIFICATION: Recent mathematical developments, specifically the work related to the sharpness of the De Giorgi recurrence exponent in the context of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations, have demonstrated that the exponent beta = 4/3 cannot be improved. This is established by showing that all potential alternative routes to improve the exponent are blocked and by the construction of extremizers that saturate the bound.
